title: Migrate activity log from US to EU server
excerpt: We are trying to perform a data migration from the US to EU servers, however, we require our metadata in the form of the item activity logs/audit trail, updates with metadata such as users who created the update, timesta…

posts.author: stevenjacobsAul (steven jacobs)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are trying to perform a data migration from the US to EU servers, however, we require our metadata in the form of the item activity logs/audit trail, updates with metadata such as users who created the update, timestamp etc. In particular the activity/audit logs are very important. Is there any solutions out there which would enable us to perform this data migration in the way we have discussed?
Thanks!
